productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Unisex Court Sequence Black Shoes
description: Made with premium aniline leather featuring a glam gold collar, the adidas Court Sequence are a must have if you want to refresh your sporty wardrobe. A part of the adidas NEO range of free-spirited shoes, the pair includes the Adidas Vibetouch midsole for added comfort.UpperAniline leather upper with perforations in the forefootAdidas patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleLacing system for snug FitSoft leather tongue and padded sockliner for all-day comfortBranding at the back of the collarMidsoleAdidas Vibetouch enhanced comfort midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleHoneycomb grooves for great tractionShoe careBrush dirt and dust off the surface and treat surface with leather impregnation sprayDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
